commonSymptoms.name: Headache
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Sudden severe headache, headache with fever and stiff neck, or headache after head injury

commonSymptoms.name: Fever
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Fever above 103°F, fever lasting more than 3 days, or fever with rash

commonSymptoms.name: Cough
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Cough with blood, cough lasting more than 3 weeks, cough with high fever or breathlessness

commonSymptoms.name: Chest Pain
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: EMERGENCY: Crushing chest pain, pain radiating to arm/jaw, chest pain with sweating or breathlessness

commonSymptoms.name: Stomach Pain / Abdominal Pain
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Severe sharp pain, blood in stool/vomit, pain with high fever, or pain lasting more than 2 days

commonSymptoms.name: Back Pain
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Back pain with numbness in legs, loss of bowel/bladder control, or pain after trauma

commonSymptoms.name: Skin Rash / Itching
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Rash covering large area, blisters, rash with fever, or rash with difficulty breathing (allergic emergency)

commonSymptoms.name: Breathing Difficulty / Shortness of Breath
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: EMERGENCY: Sudden severe breathlessness, blue lips/fingertips, inability to speak full sentences

commonSymptoms.name: Joint Pain / Swelling
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Sudden severe swelling, joint deformity, inability to bear weight, or joint pain with fever

commonSymptoms.name: Fatigue / Weakness
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Unexplained fatigue lasting more than 2 weeks, fatigue with weight loss, or fatigue with shortness of breath

commonSymptoms.name: Diarrhea
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Blood in stool, severe dehydration, diarrhea lasting >3 days, or diarrhea in infants/elderly

commonSymptoms.name: Vomiting / Nausea
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Vomiting blood, signs of dehydration, vomiting after head injury, or persistent vomiting >24 hours

commonSymptoms.name: Sore Throat
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Sore throat with high fever, difficulty swallowing/breathing, swollen lymph nodes, or sore throat >1 week

commonSymptoms.name: Eye Problems (Redness / Pain / Blurred Vision)
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Sudden vision loss, severe eye pain, flashes of light, or eye injury

commonSymptoms.name: Dizziness / Vertigo
commonSymptoms.whenToSeeDoctor: Dizziness with slurred speech, numbness, severe headache, or dizziness with hearing loss

emergencySymptoms: Sudden numbness or weakness on one side of body
Severe allergic reaction (swelling of face/throat, difficulty breathing)
